item.title: 💡 Upcoming Projects 💡
item.description: A living roadmap of the projects currently being explored and scoped.

item.title: Technique Inference Engine (TIE) 🎯
item.description: Predicts associated MITRE ATT&CK® techniques from observed adversary behavior using WALS matrix factorization.

item.title: MITRE ATT&CK Python Toolkit 🛡️
item.description: A comprehensive collection of Python scripts simulating MITRE ATT&CK techniques for security testing, education, and research.

item.title: Stammbaum 🌳📜
item.description: Desktop genealogy application built with Electron.

item.title: Aegis Forensics 📦
item.description: AI-powered digital forensics agent that runs in a secure disposable cloud sandbox.

item.title: AI Security Repo 🥷
item.description: A collection of resources related AI Security.

item.title: Console IR 🖥️
item.description: A terminal-first incident response console for real-time OCSF event ingestion, enrichment, and AI-assisted case management.

item.title: GenAI Cyber Security Repo 🗃️
item.description: A curated collection of LLM‑based resources for cyber security

item.title: Skills Tracker 📈
item.description: A Skills Tracker Application to track your skills and reach your goals

item.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Servers for Cyber 🧩
item.description: A Langgraph CTI agent that leverages a MCP client to connect to MCP Servers

item.title: Neural Malware Detector 🕷️
item.description: A Flask web app leveraging both Random Forest and RNN models to detect malware in uploaded files.

📬 Get in Touch

If you’d like to work together or have any questions, feel free to reach out using the form below or connect with me on social media.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
👋 Hello! I’m Ashfaaq Farzaan, a AI Engineer based in London, UK 🇬🇧. I love building systems that think and adapt by combining AI and cybersecurity to make technology safer for everyone.

🤖 With a background in security, system engineering, and Large Language Models (LLMs), I design and develop next-gen AI Agentic systems for security operations.

“Lifelong learning fuels my mission to push the frontier of AI-driven security.”

🎓 Education

🎖️ Academic

  • MSc in Cyber Security & Forensics (Distinction)
    University of Westminster, London, United Kingdom
    Jan 2023 – May 2024

item.title: The Third Verdict
item.description: Exploring the nuances of AI agent decision-making and accountability in autonomous cyber operations.

item.title: Periscope 🔭
item.description: An AI‑enabled system for efficient cyber incident detection and response in cloud environments.

item.title: Porsha 🫆
item.description: A Python based Digital Forensic Toolkit.

item.title: SDN-based Load Balancer for SOHO Environments 🌐⚖️
item.description: Development of an SDN-based load balancing algorithm that utilizes server bandwidth metrics, implemented on a POX controller and tested in Mininet and Raspberry Pi environments.

item.title: Enterprise Network Design for Multi-Tenant Data Center 🖧 📐
item.description: A comprehensive design diagram for a multi-tenant data center, focusing on physical and logical topologies, high availability, and disaster recovery using AWS.

item.title: Autonomous Air Controller 🌡️🏠
item.description: An IoT-based system to autonomously control air conditioner settings by monitoring room occupancy, individual body temperatures, and overall room temperature, aiming for enhanced comfort and energy efficiency.

item.title: Line Following Robot 🤖➡️
item.description: An Arduino-based robot programmed in assembly to autonomously follow a black line path.
